Privacy Policy for Kcal

Last updated: July 1, 2026

Kcal ("the app") is a calorie and macro tracking app developed by Tóth Zsombor. This policy explains what data the app processes and how.

No account required

Kcal does not require you to create an account. There is no login, no user profile, and no data is stored on our servers tied to your identity.

Data stored on your device

All food logs, goals, streaks, and saved foods are stored locally on your device using Apple's SwiftData framework. This data is not transmitted to us and is not accessible to us. If you use iCloud backup, this data may be included in your personal iCloud backup, subject to Apple's own privacy practices.

Third-party services used by the app

1. Open Food Facts (openfoodfacts.org)
When you scan a barcode or search for a food by name, the app sends the barcode or search text to the Open Food Facts API to retrieve nutritional information. This is a public, open database. No personal identifiers are sent with these requests.

2. Groq (groq.com)
When you use the "Estimate from photo" feature, the photo you take or select is sent to Groq's AI API for one-time analysis to estimate calorie and macro content. The photo is processed to generate an estimate and is not stored by us. Please refer to Groq's own privacy policy (groq.com/privacy-policy) for how they handle data sent to their API.

No advertising, no analytics, no tracking

Kcal does not use any advertising networks, analytics SDKs, or tracking technologies. We do not collect device identifiers, usage statistics, or any data for marketing purposes.

In-app purchase

Kcal offers a one-time, non-consumable in-app purchase to unlock full access after a free trial period. This purchase is processed entirely by Apple through StoreKit; we do not receive or store any payment information.

Notifications

If you enable meal reminders, these are scheduled locally on your device using Apple's notification framework. No data about your reminder preferences is sent to us or any third party.

Children's privacy

Kcal is not directed at children under 13 and does not knowingly collect data from children.

Changes to this policy

We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.

Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at: zsombor.toth@tuta.com

© 2026 Tóth Zsombor — Kcal
